progress_summary: v1.4 PR 1 (ADEV-328) shipped as #192 → 4cb0b09 — pack registry architecture. v1.4 PR 2 (ADEV-329) shipped as #203 → 22c45cd — 5 language packs (typescript/python/ruby/go/rust) backfilled under the schema with per-pack langRef docs (4.9-6.2KB each, total 27.8KB) and 16 new equivalence tests (vitest 153/153). The a11y track also wrapped earlier this session: PR #196 (ADEV-339-342, squash 08377ea) cleared the original ADEV-338 LHCI batch (TOC min-height, Shiki dual-theme, band-label color, /changelog underlines), and PR #197 (ADEV-343-347, squash ba8d0cc) shipped the root-cause follow-ups when the first batch did not fully clear LHCI: walker uses closest() to skip Shiki nested spans (kills phantom <mark>), TOC scope-attribute copy so JS-injected <li>/<a> inherit Astro scoped CSS (min-height 44px now applies), .band-label gets background:var(--bg) + z-index:1 to occlude SVG glow bleed, and a global Shiki dark-theme CSS switch so dark-mode pages use the dark palette instead of the low-contrast light theme. Final LHCI: every audited route at A11y 1.00 (architecture and changelog perf 0.89/0.92 unchanged, both warn-level). Production remains on 526a9a2 (v1.4 not yet released — PR 8 ADEV-331 ships the release). Orchestrator handoff continues to stack-forge for PR 3 (ADEV-330): deploy-ops dispatcher + api-dev pack-read + stack-forge kind:mobile branch. Approved driver semantics: hybrid — deploy-ops dispatcher does runtime pack lookup (small, lookup-only), api-dev codegens per-language scaffold templates at build time (richer; matches its api-dev surface). All three integrations land in one PR per the v1.4 plan. PRs 1-3 are serial; PRs 4-7 parallelize after PR 3. No blockers.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.

user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: Start v1.4 PR 3 (ADEV-330) — stack-forge.checkpoint.json says `pr-2-shipped-pr-3-starting / in_progress`. Three integration points in one PR: (a) deploy-ops dispatcher reads pack.yml at runtime to pick the deploy path per language/framework (small lookup, runtime), (b) api-dev codegens per-language scaffold templates at build time from pack.yml (richer; matches api-dev surface), (c) stack-forge dispatcher gets a kind:mobile branch as placeholder (iOS pack lands in PR 6, but the dispatch logic + tests can land now). Driver semantics: hybrid (runtime deploy-ops + codegen api-dev).
Cut PR 3 branch from current origin/main (22c45cd — includes ADEV-329 5 language packs). Use a descriptive name like claude/adev-330-dispatch-and-mobile.

After PR 3 lands, stack-forge moves to pr-4-starting. PRs 4-7 parallelize: PR 4 (ADEV-334) modern web bulk (phoenix/remix/sveltekit/solid/bun/deno), PR 5 (ADEV-335) enterprise bulk (spring-java/dotnet-aspnet/spring-kotlin/laravel-php), PR 6 (ADEV-336) Apple/iOS/Swift + app-store adapter, PR 7 (ADEV-337) remaining language packs / cleanup. PR 8 (ADEV-331) ships the v1.4 release.
